title: Tayo the Little Bus Season 1
synopsis: Tayo the Little Bus is about exciting adventures that are to happen in the metropolitan city where different vehicles live with harmony with one another. Tayo is just starting to learn his route in this busy city centre and on his journey, he is making many new friends. Full of unique characters that capture children's imaginations and fun storylines, the series has a lot to offer. (Source: Official YouTube channel)

When Nalong's girlfriend Ukkya is taken by force and Longman is zapped by a laser beam resulting in an unfavorable transformation--Nalong has more on his plate than he can handle!

title: Boukensha-tachi: Gamba to 7-hiki no Nakama
titleNative: 冒険者たち ガンバと7匹のなかま
synonyms: Bouken-tachi Gamba to Nanbiki no Nakama
The Adventurers Gamba and His Seven Friends
synopsis: A movie version of Gamba no Bouken, covering the main events of the series in 90 minutes. An adventurous wild mouse called Gamba travels with his friends to see the ocean but he finds an injured mouse and hears about the violence of white ferret Noroi. Gamba decides to help the mice suffering under Noroi's tyranny.

title: Perman: Birdman ga Yatte Kita!!
titleNative: パーマン バードマンがやって来た!!

title: The Configurators
synopsis: During ancient times, the hostile jellyfish-like aliens invaded Earth. One of the genius ape-man possessed the high-technology Dinosaur Configurator and defeated the aliens and saved the world. In present days, Configuration Technology has changed the entire world. Andy, Toothy and Hero have to defend together with the Super Force the world from the criminal scientist "The Mole" and the Space Jellyfish leader that invaded Earth millions years ago. The Space Jellyfish leader is trapped on Earth for many years and hopes to gain back its energy to conquer Earth again. Andy and his friends need to train and defend the Earth with their hi-tech robots -- The Configurators! (Source: CHINAnimax)

title: TEO THE MAGIC PLANET
synopsis: A failed pilot for an anime adaptation of the video game Teo: Mou Hitotsu no Chikyuu.

title: Miao Qiansui de Chengnian Li
synopsis: Sanwei Mountain is home to an ancient civilization, where Miao Qiansui and her sister Nuluo live. Miao Qiansui is an innocent little girl, full of curiosity about the outside world. In her memory, there has always been a mysterious place called Moon Lake. But is the Moon Lake real? Can she go to Moon Lake smoothly? (Source: bilibili, translated)

title: Lucky Bunny Lunny & Mx. Birthday
titleNative: ラニーちゃんとたんじょうびやさん
synopsis: The original story of Lunny-chan to Tanjoubiya-san is based on the story of tarout.

title: Mang Wasteland Period
synopsis: Fate had never been kind to Ji Ning. Wracked by illnesses and infirm his entire life on Earth, Ning knew early on that he would die as a teenager. What he didn’t know was that there really was such a thing as life after death, and that the universe was a far larger place than he thought. A lucky twist of fate (one of the few in Ning’s life) meant that Ning was reborn into a world of Immortals and monsters, of Ki Refiners and powerful Fiendgods, a world where Dynasties lasted for millions of years. A world which is both greater and yet also smaller than he ever could imagine. He would have the opportunity to join them, and in this life, Ning swore to himself, he would never let himself be weak again! The Era he was born into was a Desolate one, but Ning would make it his era. (Source: Novel Update)

title: Ishinomori Shoutarou no Rekishi Adventure
titleNative: 石ノ森章太郎の歴史アドベンチャー
synopsis: A two-part video series in which Dr. Teng (a researcher at the Time Institute) and his faithful kappa assistant Pasuke travel through time, first to the Battle of Sekigahara (1600) and then to the fourth Battle of Kawanakajima (1561). In the second installment, they then look in on the last stand of the Japanese underdog hero Yoshitsune in Hiraizu mi (1189) and then, after spending so much time on the Genpei War, suddenly leap several centuries into the future, to cover the first time Nobunaga Oda used firearms in battle, at Nagashino (1575) . A mixture of live-action and anime, described by Japanese sources as a "documentary with a touch of story," and presumably related in some way to Shotaro Ishinomori's multivolume manga history of Japan. (Source: The Anime Encyclopedia)

title: The Princess of the Desert Kingdom
titleEnglish: The Princess of the Desert Kingdom
titleNative: さばくの国の王女さま
synopsis: When the spring that supplies water to her kingdom dries up, the Princess decides to go into the desert in search of a faraway oasis that is said to exist. The Princess and her animal friends face many challenges in their journey to save the draught-stricken kingdom.

title: Pleasant Goat Sports Game
titleRomaji: Xi Yangyang Yu Hui Tailang: Yangyang Yungdong Hui
titleNative: 喜羊羊与灰太狼之羊羊运动会
synonyms: 喜羊羊与灰太狼 第二季
synopsis: Goats from various tribes gather together on the Green-Green Grassland to participate in the magnificent 125th Goats Sports Games. There are many strong competitors such as the Argali, the speedy Tibetan antelopes, and the flexible robot goats. Events like shooting, aquatics and Ping-Pong all took place and challenged the competitors. Knowing that whoever wins the games could become the leader of the goats, Wolffy and his wife disguised as goats to take part. Who will be the final winner?

title: Kkoma Sinseon Tao
synopsis: This Korean and Chinese co-production series focuses on Tao, a young boy with magical powers, as he attends school to become a wizard. Each episode was composed of two stories. (Source: Wiki)

title: Shengsi Huifang
synopsis: Young man Wei Sisi worked hard to support himself after losing all his memories. One day in an accident, he somehow obtained an ability with which he could see the memories of the dead. A series of events coming right after it made him aware that he had been involved into a well-designed conspiracy. His past was also gradually uncovered... (Source: Tencent Animation)
